name: External connections on Sensitive ports
description: External connections on Sensitive ports 22, 23, 3389, 21, 445, 2049, 1433, 3306, 5432, 27017, 53, 161, 162 for  cybersift.threat_info.knownThreat is true

config.title: External connections on Sensitive ports
config.query: isDestinationInternal:false AND (DestinationPort:22 OR DestinationPort:23 OR DestinationPort:3389 OR DestinationPort:21 OR DestinationPort:445 OR DestinationPort:2049 OR DestinationPort:53 OR DestinationPort:161 OR DestinationPort:162 OR DestinationPort:1433 OR DestinationPort:3306 OR DestinationPort:5432 OR DestinationPort:27017) AND cybersift.threat_info.knownThreat:true
